name: Terraria
description: Terraria dedicated server via SteamCMD. Full TShock-compatible server with world size and difficulty configuration.
author: GamePanel

env.name: World Name
env.description: Name for the world file. Affects the save file created.

env.name: Server Password
env.description: Password required to join the server. Leave empty for no password.

env.name: MOTD
env.description: Message of the Day shown to players on join.

env.name: Autocreate
env.description: Automatically create world if none exists (1=enable, 0=disable).

env.name: Seed
env.description: World generation seed. Leave empty for random seed.

install_script.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Terraria SteamCMD Installation Script
# Server Files: /mnt/server

cd /mnt/server

mkdir -p steamcmd
cd steamcmd

# Download and extract SteamCMD
curl -sL "https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz" | tar -xzvf -

# Install Terraria dedicated server
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 105600 validate +quit

cd /mnt/server

# Make server binary executable
if [ -f TerrariaServer.bin.x86_64 ]; then
    chmod +x TerrariaServer.bin.x86_64
elif [ -f Linux/TerrariaServer.bin.x86_64 ]; then
    cp Linux/TerrariaServer.bin.x86_64 .
    chmod +x TerrariaServer.bin.x86_64
fi

echo "Terraria server installation complete"
